pi_items.metadata_value: TiKV: A Distributed Transactional Key-Value Database
pi_items.source: Web search - Extensively searched for SIGMOD 2019 publication by Dongxu Huang (authors/pages: Huang, Liu, Cui / pp 2289-2300) with no results. TiKV was first released in 2016 by PingCAP. The only confirmed academic publication about TiDB/TiKV is the VLDB 2020 paper 'TiDB: A Raft-based HTAP Database' at https://www.vldb.org/pvldb/vol13/p3072-huang.pdf. No SIGMOD 2019 publication for TiKV found in DBLP or web searches.

privileged_info_summary: Task uses 20 systems research papers with 6 pre-tagged as priority. Four pre-2010 priority papers are verified: The UNIX Time-Sharing System (1974), End-to-End Arguments in System Design (1984), The Google File System (2003), and Chord (2001). One post-2010 priority paper is verified: Raft (2014). The second post-2010 priority paper (TiKV) claimed to be from 2019 SIGMOD could not be verified; no SIGMOD 2019 publication exists for this title/authors, and TiKV was first released as open-source in 2016 with its primary academic publication appearing in VLDB 2020, not SIGMOD 2019.
